creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 253193
Patch for libssh

ompile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)

Poudriere testport OK 13.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.0-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.1-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following users in tree with Poudriere (14.1-RELEASE):
devel/kio-extras
devel/libvirt
ftp/yafc
misc/far2l
net/bird2
net/frr8
net/frr9
net/krdc
net/remmina
net/sshping
net/x2goclient
net-mgmt/netxms
net-mgmt/rtrlib
security/gvm-libs
security/hydra
security/openvas
sysutils/tmate
sysutils/tmate-ssh-server
